candidate_definition_hints.text: Two-tier hybrid search for Rust: sub-millisecond initial results via potion-128M, quality-refined rankings in 150ms via MiniLM-L6-v2. Combines lexical (Tantivy BM25) and semantic (vector cosine) search with Reciprocal Rank Fusion. Progressive iterator API, f16 SIMD vector index, feature-gated compilation.

source_repo_description: Two-tier hybrid search for Rust: sub-millisecond initial results via potion-128M, quality-refined rankings in 150ms via MiniLM-L6-v2. Combines lexical (Tantivy BM25) and semantic (vector cosine) search with Reciprocal Rank Fusion. Progressive iterator API, f16 SIMD vector index, feature-gated compilation.
